items.name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.

items.name_en: 【Zippy Wallet】M63095 Black Flower (Vintage)
items.name_cn:
【Zippy Wallet】M63095 Black Flower (Vintage)
This "Card Case Organizer De Posh" is made of Blush Monogram cowhide with faded Monogram patterns and used Patina (shadows). The texture reminiscent of weathered leather saddles highlights a minimalist beauty. Multiple practical pockets and compartments easily hold cash, credit cards, and coins.
Size: 20x10cm.

Size: 20x10cm.
